overview.title: Financial Overview
overview.description: The overview page displays your complete financial picture in a single screen.

tips.text: Check total balance, income, and expenses for the current month in the stats cards at the top.
Pie/bar charts show spending distribution by category — hover to see details.
Recent transactions list shows your 5–10 latest entries. Click to view all.
Data updates automatically when you add new transactions.

transactions.title: Transaction Management
transactions.description: Record and track all your income and expenses.

tips.text: Click 'Sync Sepay Transactions' to automatically import your full bank transaction history — no manual entry needed.
Click '+' or 'Add Transaction' to record a new income or expense.
Use filters (type, category, date range) to find specific transactions.
Assign a category to each transaction — this improves the accuracy of your reports.
Attach receipts or images to a transaction using the upload button.
Click on any transaction to edit or delete it at any time.
Export your transaction list using the Export button (if supported).

planning.title: Budget Planning
planning.description: Set spending limits per category to better control your finances.

tips.text: Create a plan by selecting a category, entering a target amount, and choosing a repeat cycle (Daily / Weekly / Monthly / Yearly).
Use 'NO_REPEAT' for one-time goals, e.g., buying a car or a vacation fund.
The green/yellow/red progress bar shows how much of your budget you've used.
You'll receive a notification when you're close to or have exceeded your limit.
The 'Group Plans' tab lets you share budgets with group members.

groups.title: Financial Groups
groups.description: Manage shared finances with family, friends, or colleagues.

tips.text: Create a new group using the '+' button — give it a name and description.
Invite members by email or username — they'll receive an invitation notification.
In the group detail page, you can view shared transactions and group budgets.
Click the chat icon to open the group chat — discuss finances directly in the app.
You can leave a group at any time from the group detail page.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Analyze income and spending trends with visual charts.

tips.text: Select a time range (week / month / quarter / year) to view the corresponding statistics.
The pie chart shows the proportion of spending by category.
The line chart shows income/expense trends over time.
Switch between 'Income' and 'Expense' views using the tabs.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Deep-dive into your spending behavior with AI-powered insights and forecasts.

tips.text: AI automatically analyzes your spending patterns and provides personalized insights.
View a spending forecast for next month based on your history.
Spending anomalies (sudden spikes) are highlighted in red.
The 'Saving Tips' section suggests ways to optimize spending based on your data.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Generate and automatically send periodic financial reports.

tips.text: Choose a report type (income/expense, budget, group) and date range to export.
Set up automatic delivery (daily/weekly/monthly) — reports will be emailed to you.
Use the Cron Builder to set a custom schedule if you need a non-standard frequency.

myAccount.title: Bank Accounts
myAccount.description: Manage your bank accounts and wallets.

tips.text: Add a new account by entering the bank name, account number, and initial balance.
When creating a transaction, select the correct account so the balance updates accurately.
Edit or delete an account from the list — deleting an account does not delete related transactions.
Add a new loan — specify the borrower/lender, amount, interest rate, and due date.
Mark a loan as 'Paid' once the debt is settled.
Filter loans by status: active / paid / overdue.

myBalance.title: Balance & Net Worth
myBalance.description: View a summary of balances across all your accounts.

tips.text: Total balance is calculated as the sum of all active accounts.
The balance history chart shows how your net worth has grown or declined over time.

myCards.title: Card Management
myCards.description: Manage your credit and debit cards.

tips.text: Add a card with its credit limit, statement date, and payment cycle.
You'll be alerted when a payment due date is approaching or when you're near your credit limit.

investment.title: Investment & Market
investment.description: Track your investment portfolio and market prices.

tips.text: View real-time price movements for stocks and crypto.
Add investment assets to track your total portfolio value.
The ticker at the top shows prices for popular symbols — click for details.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Update your personal information and account settings.

tips.text: Update your avatar by clicking on your current profile picture and selecting a new one.
Switch the display language (Vietnamese / English) in the Language section.
Change your password via Keycloak — click 'Change Password' to be redirected to the security page.
